creator: ddobrev85@gmail.com
text:
Just got a crash on 13.1 -- stable/13-n252201
And this is with net.inet.tcp.rfc6675_pipe=0

Here's kgdb:

# kgdb /boot/kernel/kernel /var/crash/vmcore.4
